title: Wide Blade Tape Measure
summary: Wide blade tape measure for construction and hardware buyers, designed for stable standout, clear blade markings, ergonomic case, OEM branding, and export packaging.
sellingPoints: Wider blade for improved standout and jobsite readability
Ergonomic ABS/rubber shell for construction and hardware channels
Custom logo, shell color, blade specification and retail packaging options

specs.label: Material
specs.value: High-carbon steel tape, ABS shell, nylon lanyard, stainless steel hook, belt clip

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Logo label or printing, Pantone shell color, blade specification, hook, belt clip, lanyard, barcode, carton mark, and retail packaging

specs.label: Packaging
specs.value: OPP bag, color box, blister card, display box, export carton, buyer barcode, and carton mark

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: Flexible MOQ, to be confirmed by order details

specs.label: Lead time
specs.value: Custom logo samples ready in about 3 days. Bulk lead time can be negotiated based on order quantity and packaging requirements.

quality: Blade standout, straightness, printing clarity, and surface coating check
Lock, hook rivet, retraction, and belt clip function test
Case grip, shell assembly, drop-resistance, and appearance inspection
Packaging artwork, barcode label, carton mark, and shipment review
targetBuyers: Construction tool importers, hardware distributors, building material wholesalers, and private-label tape measure brands
